queryIdQueryStringName.label: QueryID QueryString Name
queryIdQueryStringName.description: QueryString name you use for when storing the Algolia QueryID in a page URL.

algoliaPlugin.title: Algolia Browser Plugin
algoliaPlugin.description: Enriches all Segment payloads with the Algolia query_id value
algoliaPlugin.defaultSubscription: type = "track" or type = "identify" or type = "page" or type = "group" or type = "alias"
